lessons: - When the anchor close sits at or very near the window low after a sharp multi-day selloff, do not assign P below 0.50 — treat the extended downside as mean-reversion-prone and push P toward or slightly above 0.50.
- When price closes at or very near the window low after a sharp multi-day decline, treat continuation as no more likely than reversion and keep P within 5 points of 0.50.
